name: test-end-to-end
description: Autonomous E2E QA engine — 13 agents, 11 MCP tools. Zero-prompt test generation, OWASP PR audit (Sentinel), chaos injection (ChaosMonkey), architecture analysis (ArchPolice), npm auto-fix (Dependabot), Jira/Trello/Slack/OVH integrations. Zero-Token Bypass via SHA-256 + Ollama.
